title: ATOM-187 Men-only (secret) property 1LDK (Lady Dining Kitchen) ~ Dream studio with your favorite woman ~ - Natsumi
overview: Spear every day with the highest level beauty! Property "1LDK" with a man's longing beauty! The best property that fulfills a man's dream was introduced to a suspicious real estate agent! Dirty baby amber song, sadist Tsugumi Mutou with a whip, and cute little sister Karen Hazuki are rampaging! ?? It also cooks and cleans! Above all, it is the best studio where a beautiful woman can do it!
